overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a grassy mountain cliff edge as golden hour fog clears to reveal a vast valley, coastline, and distant mountains below. The character eventually stops to observe the panoramic view.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain cliff edge in dense fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow cliff path through thick fog with limited visibility of the drop below

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail along the edge of a grassy cliff
tall green grass covering the cliff top
tall green grass and low bushes on the cliff edge
large rocky cliff face formation on the right side of the path
thick white fog obscuring the valley and horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a narrow dirt path on a grassy mountain cliff. Dense fog envelops the scene, limiting visibility to the immediate surroundings. The character moves steadily forward along the cliff edge, with a large rock outcropping visible to the right and tall grass lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with clearing fog revealing valley below

events.description: fog begins to clear revealing the valley, coastline, and water below the cliff
distant mountain range becomes visible in the background as fog continues to dissipate

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff path as the fog clears and the expansive valley view opens up

entered.detail: sweeping view of the valley floor with terrain features becoming visible through the fog
sandy shoreline and blue water visible at the base of the cliffs
mountain range visible in the far background under the clearing sky

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the dense fog gradually clears to reveal a breathtaking view of the valley below. The coastline and blue water become visible at the base of the cliffs, followed by the appearance of distant mountains in the background. The path remains consistent along the cliff edge with the rock outcropping still present on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with panoramic valley and coastal view

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the panoramic view

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge looking out over the valley, coastline, and distant mountain range

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a stop at the cliff edge, standing still to take in the panoramic view. With the fog now cleared, the full scope of the valley, coastline, and distant mountains is visible in the warm golden hour light. The camera remains focused on the character and the expansive vista ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain cliff that transforms from a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded path into a vast, sun-drenched panoramic vista. It begins with a third-person view of a character walking along a narrow dirt path, where dense fog limits visibility to the immediate tall grass and a large rock outcropping. As the character moves steadily forward, the fog gradually lifts to reveal the breathtaking scale of the valley below, uncovering a distant coastline and blue water. The scene then opens further to expose towering mountains in the background as the lighting shifts into a warm golden hour glow. Finally, the character comes to a stop at the cliff's edge, remaining still as the camera captures the full, expansive scope of the landscape.
